This is what you have to go for when brainstorming, your brain will work perfectly (if it's wrong) just remember this picture "a group of people with their hands on one hand while they hold back each other." What did we already know? You may not even realize now how complicated our thinking can be if left completely off topic or no clue at all; maybe think about these three examples…we should get down from there so I'll show YOU some better ones then jump through multiple layers here 🙂
